reviews.title: Nice looking but---
reviews.text:
Just received yesterday so can't comment on accuracy yet. Got watch set up through app with no problems. Then the maddening part-One of reasons I ordered this watch was watch face on Amazon pictures. Well, I scrolled down through all the faces on the app 4 times and the shown watch face was not even there for download-What the hell!!!!! I've ordered 6 or 7 smart watches and this is the first one without magnetic charging cable. Has this plastic thingy at end of cord you have to push watch down into in order to charge. Don't like this at all. Haven't decided whether to keep or not but not off to a good start.
After a few days another problem. Battery charge on watch shows 100% all the time even after 2 days of wearing. Impossible for battery level not to go down somewhat if not a lot. Returning.

reviews.title: Cheap watch with premium features!
reviews.text:
I own several smart watches only because I like different styles. I have to say this one is very stylish and elegant. Works very well and has tons of features. The watch band feels strong and durable.

Some of the reading features such as the blood pressure monitor is not 100 percent accurate but pretty close compared to a cuff system.

Battery last a few days before needing a charge again. It’s also IP68, has music control once paired to your phone, heart rate monitor, blood oxygen readings, call & text notifications, and so much more!

If you are looking for a smart watch that would not break the bank, then this is it! Go and get yourself one of these today! It’s highly recommended!

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

description:

Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5

Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Seems nice

Seems like a nice watch. It has a standard user interface for a smart watch.

I like the design and think that it seems nice

reviews.title: Works well for step counting and can measure heartrate upon request. Otherwise less than stellar
reviews.text:
This generally works well enough for exercise purposes. I didn't get the "dangerous app warning" on my iPhone, though I did get a warning that if I use the watch to display messages, then the app has access to all my contacts and the text of all my messages. I doubt I'm a target for Chinese spying so I chose to ignore that, but it's still worth noting.

I love that it's waterproof, other watch faces are available (though I couldn't figure out how to restore the original, more-helpful one without doing a full factory reset), it tracks steps and sleep, plus it's able to measure heartrate and blood pressure. Mine sometimes tells me the weather, but only immediately after connecting to my Google account on my phone; otherwise it just says "unknown" (and honestly, if I have to click extra buttons on my phone, I can just check the weather there). It has a music playback control, but I couldn't get that to work. It also theoretically connects to my phone and lets me enter a phone number, but I couldn't click "dial" so that bit felt more like a child's toy, where you pretend to call a phone but don't actually do it. But since I use this for exercise more than connectivity, I'm OK with that.

Some things are less than stellar, like their heart rate screen always shows a default chart (I don't think it ever lets you create your own heart rate chart)... and it shows a heartrate from 120-150 ALWAYS, which catches me off guard when I've been sitting at my desk for 2 hours. But I learned it's just a concept; there is no real *graph of my heartrate that I can find, just current / min / max that I can see from my phone. Or I can click "measure" to get my instant heartrate on my phone (good while exercising). Blood pressure can sometimes be measured from your phone (though it takes 1-4 minutes for some reason), and sometimes that screen disappears completely; I haven't yet figured out the pattern

It doesn't seem to measure many things other than steps automatically; you have to select each one when you're wanting to see it. Soooooooo all told it's solidly mediocre. It's good for counting steps, manually checking heartrate, and manually checking blood pressure (very slowly) on occasion; otherwise it's a lot weaker than most smart phones

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

title: SUUNTO 7 GPS Sports Smart Watch

reviews.title: Waste of money
reviews.text: Don’t waste your money

reviews.title: I like this one better than my other smart watch
reviews.text: I have a big deal designer's name brand smart watch which has a battery life of like 12 hours max and that's with disabling just about everything!  The problem with charging that (and this) smart watch is the fact that you can't just plug them in anywhere with a regular micro usb.  They have their proprietary charging "cradle" that gloms onto the back of the watch.  This one seem so far to have a higher battery life without having to shut down every app to extend the battery life.  The only thing I would wish is that if they market these to both men and women, MAKE THE WATCH FACE A BIT SMALLER!!!  I understand about seeing/reading everything on the watch, but JEEZ it is HUGE!!!  I had to fasten it further down on my wrist/arm so the watch face fit my arm.  I'm not a tiny woman nor am I a big one, so if that's a problem for an average woman, please take note and scale it back by about 3%.  Otherwise, this is a great smart watch.  Runs on Google OS which my other watch runs on and seems to do pretty much the same things.

reviews.title: My husband LOVES this watch!
reviews.text:
I got this watch for my husband who is 6'3. This watch fits his wrist really well. He has used this for over a month before the review.

CONS (very minor):
1. If you move your hand the right way it can hit the buttons on the side and start apps by accident
2. It can be sensitive when moving your hand around and turn on the clock display/run down the battery faster
3. I don't like that the charger is so specific. It would be nice to be able to have more than 1 option to charge

PROS:
1. Battery Life: Easily lasts 1.5 days before charging and it was fine. If it runs down really low it will automatically go into battery saving mode and only functions as a normal watch. It charges very quickly
2. Style: It looks nice. The face size is a good size and easy to read. The band is silicone, comfortable and holds up well to a lot of use. My husband has received many compliments on it. You can change the clock face to a few different options and customize it to you.
3. Alerts: When you get notifications of a message or call the watch vibrates. The watch has a microphone but no speakers so you cannot have a phone call through it or play music. You can type a message or even do a voice to text using the watch.
4. Calendar: The calendar function is nice and gives notifications for upcoming events. It makes it nice when he is in a meeting especially
5. Exercise: It took a while to figure out, but the exercise tracking is nice. My husband doesn't run but does like to lift weights and do other exercise. He was even able to calibrate the watch and it will count his reps for him. It also tracks heart rate, which you can set to track throughout the day. It also tracks steps.
6. GPS: The watch has a GPS and map function. You can see where you are and toggle the maps around to see routes around you. You can also set up multiple route paths ahead if you run/bike etc.
7. Durability: My husband swam with it in a saltwater pool and had no issues, it is definitely water safe. He has hit it accidentally on a few corners/desks and the glass has held up really well, no scratches. The touch sensitivity is great, easy to control but not OVERLY sensitive.

Overall it is a great watch!

reviews.title: Luxury, time and tracking for the seasoned athlete or outdoorsman!
reviews.text:
First things first: you have to be a true athlete or outdoorsman to really want to spend this kind of money on a smartwatch when there are others, but the features on this one make it exceptional. My son has truly been able to maintain his sanity after having to leave school and fly solo during this crisis. He has thrown himself into a variety of workouts to keep himself busy since he can't socialize and thinks this watch is one of the best items he owns.

The GPS features allow him to explore routes, trails, and areas he wasn't previously acquainted with (offline too!) and the health data points are accurate. There are dozens of sports modes for whatever activity he chooses for the day and the display itself is beautiful, bright and very responsive.

I wouldn't pay this much for a watch because I prefer a sedentary lifestyle (LOL) but for the athlete in your family with a long and hot summer ahead, this is the perfect graduation gift too!

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing watch. I have and iPhone and works flawlessly. Only inconvenience is the battery, it barely make it thru the day even don't using gps or other sporty functions. It would be perfect if only
Suunto fix that, otherwise is better than the Ultra for me.

title: Apple Watch SE (GPS, 40mm) - Silver Aluminum Case with Abyss Blue Sport Band (Renewed)
description: Stay safe, active, and healthy with the Apple Watch SE. The SE sports the same bright LTPO OLED Retina display as the Series 6, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. On it, you can view all of your fitness metrics, health stats, and mobile notifications. When it comes to health, the SE's optical heart rate monitor can give you indicators of a possible medical condition with notifications for high or low heart rates, as well as irregular rhythms. Even healthy habits are supported, such as hand-washing detection, which displays a 20-second animated countdown as you scrub. Fitness is a large part of staying healthy, and the Apple Watch SE has a variety of ways to assist you in reaching your goals. Activity Rings displays three rings that correspond to movement, exercise, and standing. Stay mobile throughout the day to hit new personal bests as you close the rings.You can also choose from a variety of workouts, such as running, swimming, yoga, cycling, and more; with the watch recording and tracking their specific metrics. Whether inside or outdoors, the SE can guide you via GPS and even provide continuous elevation updates on screen. As you move, choose from a variety of music, podcasts, and audiobooks to entertain and motivate you. For added fun, share your activity rings with friends and challenge them to 7-day activity competitions. Throughout the day, the Apple Watch SE keeps you connected with the world around you. When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts directly from your wrist, navigate your surroundings with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to interact with Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'. Use its 32GB of built-in storage for apps, watch faces, music, and more.
features: LEAVE YOUR PHONE IN YOUR POCKET: Apple Watch SE GPS Model lets you call, text, and get directions from your wrist, while leaving your phone in your pocket. It offers multiple connectivity options, including: Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC to suit your needs, whatever they might be.

LARGE RETINA OLED DISPLAY: The SE sports a bright LTPO OLED Retina display, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. A variety of watch faces are available for the SE watch, including faces that provide essential information for specific activities.

LOADED WITH FEATURES: When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts from your wrist, navigate with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to activate Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'.

WORKOUTS THAT DON'T QUIT: Cycling, yoga, swimming, high-intensity interval training...the list goes on. You name it, Apple Watch measures it. Set workout-specific goals, see full summaries when you're done, and track how you're trending over time in the Activity app on your iPhone.

GET LOST IN YOUR MUSIC: With Apple Music on your wrist, you've got 60 million tracks of musical motivation to take you places. You can also catch up on the latest podcasts or listen to an audiobook if that's your thing. Stream everything you need right from your watch, even without your phone.

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

title: HAYUL Elastic Bands Compatible with Fitbit Inspire 2/ Inspire/Inspire HR for Women Men, Stretchy Fabric Soft Nylon Loop Band for Inspire Fitness Tracker, Skin-Friendly Replacement Wristband Accessory
features: COMPATIBILITY-- HAYUL Elastic nylon band compatible with fitbit Inspire/ Inspire 2/ Inspire HR fitness tracker. Please check your device model before purchasing.

SOFT&COMFORTABLE-- The stretchy band is made of high quality elastic fabric. It is comfortable to wear on wrist. The material is breathable and soft, which means you could wear it to sleep but feel like there’s nothing. Even kids could wear it with no worry.

ONE SIZE FITS ALL-- HAYUL Elastic fabric band fits for 5.3 inch-8.3 inch wrists. Loop design and the adjustable buckle allows you to adjust the length according to your wrist. The stretchy nylon cloth will wrap around your wrist but won’t make you feel tight.

STYLISH DESIGN-- The colorful elastic cloth band has stylish pattern design. The pattern makes the band looks more vivid and creative. The stylish elastic band is suitable for many occasions, no matter daily occasions or formal occasions.

EASY TO INSTALL-- The stretchy band is super easy to install. Just press the spring upside, then the band could connect with your Inspire tightly. Loop design makes it easy to wear and when you wear it, you won’t worry about it will fall.

reviews.title: Big upgrade over the original
reviews.text:
Feels great, doesn't leave marks on my skin which the fitbit one did. Only had to adjust it once, taking it off/on is like a rubber band.
Also I really like the way the metal looks for where it meets the fitbit

reviews.title: Finally a comfortable stretchy band
reviews.text: This watch band, that I have for my FitBit Inspire 2 is just what I was looking for. I hated the band that came with it.  I tried another buckle, cloth band, which was ok, but still a challenge to take on and off of my wrist.  This band is easy to attach to the Fit bit watch, and the length is adjustable (which I think is unusual for a slip-on stretchy band.  I even am ok with the multi color.  It makes it easy to pair up with lots of tops.  It can be adjusted in length to most everyone's wrist.  I have a very small wrist (short woman here) and I was able to make it small enough for me. But there is also a lot of room for expansion.

reviews.title: Your “cake pants” band
reviews.text: This is super comfortable. I’ve got a few bands at this point. Resin (oooh, pretty). Leather (old school charm). Canvas (slick). Silicone, of course (modern). This one is like putting on your cake pants after Thanksgiving Dinner. It’s not the prettiest but it’s just fine. More than fine. You can live (too much?) in this thing…

title: Polar Vantage V2 - Premium Multisport Smartwatch with GPS
features: Premium Sleek Design for superior look and feel provides you with a high-performing, lightweight (only 52g) sports watch that won’t weigh you down whilst you train.
Ultra-Long Battery Life - up to 40h of training with full GPS and HR tracking (and even up to 100h with power save options). Up to 7 days in watch mode with 24/7 HR tracking.
Our World-Renowned Optical HR Technology with 10 LED’s for deeper light penetration, and 4 detectors to sense light returning through the blood vessels to track your HR with precision.

The Training Load Pro and Recovery tracking tools help you optimize your training and avoid overtraining. Test your performance and personalize your heart rate, speed and power zones with the running and cycling performance tests.

Fully Automatic and Intelligent Overnight Recovery Measurement applications give you daily feedback on how well you recover from stress and training during the night. This helps you make optimal choices the next day.

reviews.title: Good watch, I recommend
reviews.text: I came from a fitbit for long years and moved to Polar because of stats and data that I wanted! I started off with the Polar Unite since November 2020 and until now I upgraded to the Polar Vantage V2! It's worth it! I love the accuracy of polar. Heart rate, sleep and GPS is super good!

reviews.title: Changing my review
reviews.text:
Band does not clip completely into the FitBit--in fact, you do NOT get that snug ""snap" or "click" sound when you attach it. It fell off my wrist 3 times in yoga this morning. Returning this junk.

I bought these so I'd have something other than the band that came with my Fitbit Charge 5. These are okay. They look fine, but they are really, really long, with no way to shorten them. I have small wrists (5 3/4") and as you can tell from the photo, the end of the band comes almost to the watch face on the other side and sticks up. I did eventually pull the tab so that it lays flat, but I'm not used to having the end of the watch band on the side. The product description online says it fits a wrist 5.1" to 8.7". If my wrist was any smaller, the band would probably cover the watch face. Unfortunately, there wasn't a "small" option.

title: Beantech Gold Engage Plus Smartwatch for iOS and Android with 8GB of Music Storage and Leather Strap
description: Beantech Engage Plus smart Watch provides full function applications in a classically elegant design. Stay healthy by using a full array of fitness apps, then back up your data on Beantech Watch app. Send and receive phone calls, texts and emails on the Watch. Bit Watch app available on Apple app store and Google play store at No additional cost. Polished Silver with Brown Calfskin Leather strap.
features: FUNCTION - full function smart watch in a Classic design. Ips touch screen for bright clear viewing and interfacing with pre-loaded apps. Works with iPhone or Android.
COMMUNICATIONS - send and receive phone calls, texts and email. Receives notifications from phone apps.
FITNESS- count daily steps, check your heart rate, monitor your sleep patterns and upload to Bit watch app to keep track. Compare to daily goals.
MUSIC VAULT - 8G of on board storage allows you to load and store over 1000 songs on the watch, then take them with you without your phone!
BIT WATCH APP - interfaces with Bit watch app to allow communications, sync time and store fitness data. Bit watch app is available in Apple app store and Google play store at no additional cost.
COMPATIBILITY - iPhone - iOS 7.1 or higher and model 5S or newer. Android phones - Android 4.4 or higher.
